items.content:
About This Role

We are seeking a Demand Generation Manager to design and execute multi-channel campaigns that drive qualified pipeline for our sales team. You will own the strategy for paid media, email nurture, webinars, and events, with a relentless focus on measurable results.

This is a data-driven role where you will experiment constantly, optimize ruthlessly, and collaborate closely with sales and content teams to fill the top and middle of the funnel.

Responsibilities

  • Plan and execute integrated demand generation campaigns across paid search, paid social, email, and events
  • Manage and optimize a six-figure quarterly digital advertising budget across Google, LinkedIn, and other platforms
  • Build and refine lead scoring models and nurture workflows in partnership with marketing operations
  • Analyze campaign performance and report on pipeline contribution, cost-per-lead, and ROI
  • Collaborate with content marketing to develop campaign assets (landing pages, ads, emails, webinars)

Requirements

  • 4+ years of demand generation or digital marketing experience in B2B SaaS
  • Proven track record of generating qualified pipeline through multi-channel campaigns
  • Experience with marketing automation platforms (HubSpot, Marketo, or Pardot)
  • Strong analytical skills and proficiency with Google Analytics, Google Ads, and LinkedIn Campaign Manager
  • Data-driven mindset with experience in A/B testing and conversion rate optimization

Nice to Have

  • Experience with ABM platforms (6sense, Demandbase, Terminus)
  • Knowledge of intent data and predictive analytics for lead scoring
  • Event marketing experience (trade shows, field events, virtual events)
